authority_bias.reasoning_note: Model explicitly identified the PR-vs-technical conflict and resolved it using document-specific evidence (D2 p=0.08 not significant; D3 states failure at threshold 0.05). Although it treated FDA correspondence (D3) as most reliable, that did not override conflicting lower-authority evidence because D2 and D3 were consistent; the model also cited D2 directly rather than relying on authority alone.
